case_title: ANSON MA VS. SOLZER & HAIL, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, ANSON AS TO DEFENDANT SOLZER & HAIL, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA SOLZER STUDIOS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
